title: Messi free-kick into the top corner
description: Messi curls a 25-yard free-kick over the wall into the top-right corner. The Azteca falls silent, then erupts.

title: Ronaldo's last-minute header
description: Ronaldo rises above two defenders to head home a stoppage-time winner, then sprints off for one more Siuuu.

title: Mbappé solo run from halfway
description: Mbappé collects on halfway, burns three Brazilians and slots it low. A breathtaking solo goal.

title: Haaland's thunderbolt volley
description: Haaland meets a cross with a first-time volley that rips the net. Norway stun Germany.

title: Vini Jr nutmeg and finish
description: Vini dances down the left, nutmegs his man, cuts in and curls it far corner. Pure samba.

title: Dibu's decisive penalty save
description: Dibu guesses right and pushes away the decisive penalty to send Argentina to the final.

title: Bellingham's late winner
description: Bellingham arrives late and smashes home an 88th-minute winner, arms outstretched.

title: Yamal's wonder goal in the final
description: Teenage sensation Yamal cuts in from the right and bends an unstoppable shot into the top corner.

title: De Bruyne's outside-foot assist
description: KDB whips an outside-of-the-boot pass through the defense onto a teammate’s foot.

title: Pulisic sends the home crowd wild
description: Pulisic latches onto a through ball and finishes coolly to send the host nation into raptures.

title: Hakimi's overlapping run
description: Hakimi bombs down the right, beats his man and delivers an inch-perfect cross.

title: Pedri's no-look through ball
description: Pedri threads a no-look pass between two defenders to release a runner one-on-one.

title: Álvarez's counter-attack strike
description: Álvarez leads a lightning counter and finishes first time across the keeper.

title: Saka's mazy dribble and goal
description: Saka glides past three challenges before curling into the bottom corner.

title: Griezmann's swerving strike
description: Griezmann drops deep, drives forward and unleashes a swerving 30-yarder.

title: Rodrygo's cheeky chip
description: Rodrygo dinks a delicate chip over the onrushing keeper. Brazil in full flow.

title: Foden's curler into the side net
description: Foden shifts onto his left and bends one beyond the dive of the keeper.

title: Wirtz's last-gasp equaliser
description: Wirtz reacts quickest in a scramble to rescue a point in stoppage time.

title: Valverde's screamer
description: Valverde lets fly from distance and the ball flies in off the underside of the bar.

title: A dazzling wing run
description: A jinking run down the left leaves two defenders for dead before the cutback.

title: Leão's burst and finish
description: Leão outpaces the defence and rifles it home at the near post.

title: Musiala's close-control magic
description: Musiala wriggles through a packed box, somehow keeping the ball glued to his feet.

title: A first-time volley
description: Barella meets a cleared corner with a dipping first-time volley.

title: Chucky on the break
description: Lozano races clear and slots past the keeper to seal the upset.

title: Son’s consolation rocket
description: Son cuts in and thumps a left-footed rocket into the top corner.

title: A fingertip save in the final
description: A full-stretch fingertip save keeps Spain alive in the shootout.

title: A last-ditch goal-line clearance
description: Rice slides in to hook the ball off the line in extra time.

title: Dembélé’s double-stepover assist
description: Dembélé bamboozles his marker with a double stepover before squaring it.

title: Enzo opens the final
description: Enzo arrives at the edge of the box to sweep Argentina ahead early.

title: Gavi’s tireless press wins it
description: Gavi hounds the defender into a mistake deep in stoppage time.

title: Onana denies Brazil
description: Onana flies to his top corner to tip a curling effort over the bar.

title: Vlahović powers one in
description: Vlahović bullies his marker and powers a header past the keeper.

title: Gakpo’s drive from the left
description: Gakpo cuts in and drills low across goal into the far corner.

title: Tchouaméni from range
description: Tchouaméni steps up and crashes one in from 30 yards.

title: Kubo’s clever turn
description: Kubo spins away from two markers in a phone-box of space.

title: Davies bombs forward
description: Davies tears 60 yards up the left and whips in the assist.

title: Modrić’s outside-foot pass
description: Modrić bends a sumptuous outside-foot ball into the channel.

title: Osimhen rises highest
description: Osimhen climbs above the defence to thump a header home.

title: Rodri finishes the move
description: Rodri arrives to side-foot home the winner after Pedri’s pass.

title: Courtois’ stoppage-time wall
description: Courtois spreads himself to deny a certain winner at the death.
